---
title: "nitrix.stats.glm"
generated: true
signature-hash: e689ed8e04122f98
description: "Mass-univariate generalised linear models."
listing:
  id: nitrix-stats-glm-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-stats-glm/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.stats.glm`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Mass-univariate generalised linear models.

`glm_fit` fits the same design `X` (`N, p`) to every element (voxel /
vertex / fixel) of a response tensor `Y` (`V, N`) -- the mass-univariate
"one model per element, shared design" workload behind ModelArray's `lm` and
the parametric backbone of GAM (`gam.py`) and the permutation engine
(`inference/randomise`).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `N` | observations — time points, subjects, or sampled points |
| `m` | rows of a multi-row contrast |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-stats-glm-symbols}
:::
